title: BLOCK 2 endpoint: 30-lesson milestone
description: Closing 30 lessons — combined paragraph with all letters, punctuation, and numbers
text: today, 25 may 2026, marks 30 lessons completed. you've learned 26 letters, 10 digits, and 9 punctuation marks; that's the foundation. next: symbols, speed, and real-world practice. you've earned it!
tips: Every letter, digit, and punctuation mark you've trained
Pass at 30 WPM and you're ready for Block 3 (symbols and speed)

character_tips.anna: 🏆 30 lessons! You're 30% through the course. Real fluency is forming.
character_tips.maxim: 30 lessons. 26 letters, 10 digits, full punctuation. Time to add symbols.
character_tips.knopych: 30-LEVEL CHECKPOINT! 🏆 You're a typing warrior now!
character_tips.klavochka: 30 lessons, my star! You've come SO far! 🌟✨
